LanguageData.SAB_DecreaseBy10k_Desc: Reduce the wealth suppression amount by 10,000 silver.
LanguageData.SAB_Configure_Desc: Open the configuration panel to set the wealth suppression amount precisely (current: {0} silver).
LanguageData.SAB_IncreaseBy10k_Desc: Increase the wealth suppression amount by 10,000 silver.
LanguageData.SAB_DialogTitle: Subspace Asset Blackhole Generator — Wealth Suppression Settings
LanguageData.SAB_Inspect_Active: Subspace field active: suppressing {0} silver of wealth
LanguageData.SAB_Inspect_Unpowered: Subspace field offline (configured: {0} silver, currently inactive)
